race.comment: MR BUBBALUSKI (4) has been plying his trade in tougher contests in town and will be at peak fitness for this. Looks very hard to toss against this line-up. GAS BRIGADE (3) finally broke the maiden status last time out and will have derived a stack of confidence from that breakthrough victory. Can go right on with the job now. Former Victorian ADVANCE TO JAFFA (1) got the maiden out of the way before being given further time to mature. Respect any market confidence. KETTLEBELL (8) doesn't win out of turn but is capable enough on her day. One for the exotics players. ALBANIAN BEAUTY (2) best of the rest with the 1.5kg claim.
